allow: Bash(python -c "import db; db.init_db\(\); import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/russian_learning.db'\); rows = conn.execute\('SELECT prompt, example FROM items WHERE example IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\); print\(rows\)")
Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/russian_learning.db'\); print\([r[1] for r in conn.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(items\)'\).fetchall\(\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/russian_learning.db'\); conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row; rows = conn.execute\('SELECT prompt, example FROM items WHERE phase_id=7 LIMIT 3'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(dict\(r\)\) for r in rows]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/russian_learning.db'\); r = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM items WHERE example IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\); print\('items with example:', r[0]\)")
